sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37193" key="e)/cersis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔξερσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n37193.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unthreading,</tr_> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίνου</foreign>] prob. cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:31:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
